name: Clam Chowder (Red Lobster)
recipeIngredient: A pinch of Dry parsley flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the clam juice, milk powder, and flour. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a 2-1/2 quart saucepan.
3. Stir in the chicken broth, stirring constantly on medium-high heat until thick and smooth.
4. Reduce the heat to low.
5. Add the chopped celery, onions, minced clams, and parsley.
6. Continue cooking on low heat for up to an hour, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
7. This recipe freezes well.
